description_long: This jet ski features a sleek, angular body with a glossy black finish and sharp, aerodynamic lines. The front section is pointed and tapers back to a wider midsection, with two prominent side panels that likely provide stability and flotation. The top surface includes a slightly raised, contoured seat area and a recessed handlebar mount, both integrated into the streamlined design. The rear of the jet ski narrows and appears to house the propulsion system, while the underside is smooth for efficient movement through water. Subtle white and gray accents are visible on the front and sides, adding contrast to the predominantly black exterior. The overall construction suggests a modern, high-performance watercraft suitable for urban waterfronts or marinas.
description: A sleek, glossy black jet ski with angular lines, a contoured seat, and subtle white and gray accents. Its streamlined body and modern design suggest high performance.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the contoured seat, handlebar mount, and the symmetrical, angular body shape.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the elongated, tapered front, side panel, and the angled rear fin.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the pointed nose, wide midsection, and the central white accent at the front.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with the same elongated body, side panel, and rear fin visible.
attribute_handlebar_design: The handlebar is straight, black, and appears to have simple grips at each end, with no visible controls or embellishments.
attribute_seat_configuration: The seat is a single, contoured section integrated into the body, designed for one rider, with a smooth black surface and no visible seams or padding.
